message:
fix(chrome): use unique temp dir for downloads and platform-specific save handling

Downloads now use a per-process temp directory ({TMPDIR}/termweb-dl-{pid})
instead of a fixed /tmp/termweb-downloads path. On Linux, completed
downloads stay in the temp dir with the path copied to clipboard via
OSC 52 (zero external dependencies). On macOS, the existing osascript
save dialog is preserved unchanged.
